{{Quote|The residents of Harlequin Station wish to express their sincere appreciation and gratitude for your heroic efforts in the protection of our station.|Brauken's e-mail to Ace Azzameen|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Brauken''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who served as the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of the trading outpost ''[[Harlequin Station]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] helped fend off an attack on the station, Brauken sent him a Key to the Station, and expressed his gratitude in an [[e-mail]] message to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] pilot.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
